value.found_quote: ADK Context Compaction feature is designed to reduce the size of context as an agent is running by summarizing older session history—including instructions, inputs, and model responses.
value.rationale: The fetched page explicitly describes the ADK Context Compaction (called "Context compression" on the page) feature in detail, including that it reduces running context by summarizing older session history — instructions, inputs, and model responses — which directly matches the claim. The page also notes it is supported in ADK Python v1.16.0, Java v0.2.0, and TypeScript v0.6.0, indicating general availability (active status).
